name: webcoach-web-agents-with-memory-guidance
description: Enable web agents to learn and adapt across sessions through cross-session memory, improving navigation and task completion in dynamic web environments. Trigger: When building web automation agents that need session continuity
paperTitle: WebCoach: Web Agents with Memory Guidance
content:
## WebCoach: Web Agents with Memory Guidance

Enable web agents to learn and adapt across sessions through cross-session memory, improving navigation and task completion in dynamic web environments.

### Core Concept

Memory-augmented web agent architecture for continuous learning

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.12997

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When building web automation agents that need session continuity
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: WebCoach: Self-Evolving Web Agents with Cross-Session Memory Guidance
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.12997
